CustomField.description: SharePoint folder containing applicant scanned files for this development
CustomField.formula: IF( Municipality_Name__r.SharePoint_Folder_Created__c = true, IF( Development_Folder_Created__c = true, Municipality_Name__r.SharePoint_Folder_Muni_Calc__c & "/"& SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( Name ," ","%20") ,",","%2C") ,"(","%28") ,")","%29") ,"#","%23") , "DEVELOPMENT SHAREPOINT FOLDER NEEDED") , "MUNICIPALITY SHAREPOINT FOLDER NEEDED")
CustomField.inlineHelpText: SharePoint folder containing applicant scanned files for this development
CustomField.label: Development Folder
